title: Lotsa Modsa Fanficial
description: Lotsa Modsa SMP Modpack made by a fans
body:
# Lotsa Modsa SMP
This SMP was made by Winsweep who is a content creator... WOAH! This pack consits of **ALMOST** all the mods **BUT** the paid ones for obvious reasons but those are avalible at their respective patreons or Kofi's. **ALSO** the pack contains the client mods that everyone is believed to have! 

### Heliotropic and Befoul
- Luxintrus: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/Luxintrus)

### Grindering
- Amy: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/AmyMialee)

### Minepathy (EARLY ACCESS)
- EightSidedSquare: [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/eightsidedsquare)

### Support the other members/people behind mods
- Talon: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/TalonMC)
- WinSweep: [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/Winsweep)
- MoriyaShiine: [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/moriyashiine/posts)
- Rattiest Gang: [Discord](https://discord.gg/rattiestgang)
- Wins Workshop: [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/organization/N5orqSfg)
